text: New guide: wrap any CLI as an MCP server using the TypeScript SDK 1.29. The working example exposes git log and git diff as typed tools over stdio. Key gotchas covered: never call console.log() in a stdio server (it corrupts the JSON-RPC stream), always use spawn with shell: false to block injection, and cap large output before it blows past client limits. Includes Claude Desktop config and MCP Inspector for local testing.
